overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk alley at night, passing a body on the wet ground, moving through a covered market walkway, and approaching a food vendor stall. The scene features distinctive teal and pink neon lighting with industrial metal architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark back alley with debris and body

agents.ego_description: moving slowly past a body lying face down in a puddle with pink hair

entered.detail: human figure with bright pink hair and cybernetic enhancements lying face down in a water puddle
black garbage bags piled on the wet asphalt surface
large industrial metal gate with horizontal bars leading to a lit area beyond
large green industrial dumpster with open lid against the wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark, narrow cyberpunk alley at night. The camera moves slowly past a body with pink hair lying in a puddle, surrounded by trash bags and debris. Ahead, a metal gate structure leads to a brighter area, with a green dumpster visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition gate between alley and covered market walkway

events.description: passing through the metal gate threshold from the dark alley into the lit covered walkway
ambient lighting increases significantly as entering the neon-lit covered market area

agents.ego_description: walking through the metal gate into the busier market area with neon lighting ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow checkered jacket walking away from camera through the gate area

entered.detail: metal and translucent roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway ahead
glowing red and cyan neon signs mounted on the left wall
steam rising from floor grates creating atmospheric haze in the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the metal gate threshold into a covered walkway. The lighting shifts from dim to a mix of neon glow as steam rises from floor grates. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket walks ahead, and the roof structure becomes visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian market walkway with neon lighting

events.description: slight turn to the left while continuing forward through the pedestrian crowd

agents.ego_description: navigating through the covered walkway passing multiple pedestrians in futuristic clothing

notable_agents.action: person in teal bodysuit with bright pink boots walking past the camera from left to right
person in checkered shirt and flat cap walking toward the camera

entered.detail: vending machines and small commercial stalls lining the left side of the walkway
vertical steel beams supporting the roof structure at regular intervals

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered market walkway illuminated by cyan and pink neon lights. Pedestrians in cyberpunk attire walk in various directions, including a figure in a teal suit with pink boots. Metal support columns line the path as the camera moves deeper into the market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor stall with service counter and kitchen

events.description: turning left and entering the food stall area with service counter and kitchen equipment
slowing down and stopping at the vendor counter

agents.ego_description: approaching the food vendor counter where a worker in a reflective jacket is standing

notable_agents.action: vendor in reflective silver jacket leaning on the counter facing the service window

entered.detail: green metal service counter with food preparation area and glass partition behind
stainless steel cooking appliances and metal shelving units in the stall kitchen
metal exhaust hoods and ductwork above the cooking area

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a food vendor stall, approaching a green service counter. A vendor in a reflective silver jacket stands at the counter facing the kitchen area. Stainless steel cooking equipment and metal shelving are visible behind the counter as the camera comes to a stop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grim, narrow alleyway into the vibrant, neon-lit bustle of a covered cyberpunk market. It begins by gliding past a body with pink hair lying in a puddle amidst trash and debris, moving toward a metal gate that serves as a threshold to a brighter environment. As the camera passes through the gate, the dim lighting shifts into a glow of cyan and pink neon while steam rises from floor grates and pedestrians in futuristic attire populate the walkway. The scene then expands deeper into the market, passing metal support columns and diverse citizens before turning left toward a food vendor stall. Finally, the camera approaches a green service counter where a vendor in a reflective silver jacket stands before stainless steel cooking equipment.
